name: Mom's Pecan Tassies
recipeInstructions:
Cheese Pastry: Allow cream cheese and 1/2 cup butter to soften at room temperature, then blend together. Stir in flour. Chill for about 1 hour. Shape into 2 dozen 1-inch balls; place in ungreased 1 3/4-inch muffin pans. Press dough against the bottoms and sides.
Pecan Filling: Beat together egg, brown sugar, 1 tbsp butter, vanilla, and salt until smooth. Divide half of the pecans among the pastry-lined pans; add egg mixture and top with remaining pecans. Bake in oven at 325°F for 25 minutes or until filling is set. Cool; remove from pans.
